benefits.description: Energy no longer fades in the evening; went from waking up hard to waking up clear-headed; no longer needs a break during 30 minutes of fast walking
Waking up clear-headed instead of groggy

protocol_notes: Started SS-31 at 1mg with good results, increased to 3.5mg which was described as transformative. Recommends pairing with mitochondrial helpers: r-lipoic acid, acetyl-l-carnitine, ubiquinol, Urolithin A (Neurogan brand), nicotinamide riboside. Suggests SS-31 may be less effective without these co-supplements. Recommends for at least middle-aged users.
